content.body:
- terminal-buffer-instant-render-20260602 remains a user-visible fail: Lucas reports the buffer still flows/replays too much, so prior ready/done claims are invalidated.
- terminal-input-text-loss-20260602 is P0 because Korean/long text can disappear mid-composition before ledger capture.
- QA has not yet produced a passing focused proof for zero grid xterm previews, no replay storm, preserved Korean textarea draft, and interactive fullscreen/popout.
- Audit keeps the Caesar emergency diff uncommitted and unratified until Max scopes the fix and QA passes.
- 9100 raw-list board remains stale/noisy and needs redesign into a card/progress executive board after terminal P0 stabilization.
- Memory API/runtime evidence incomplete on active runtime; QA reports memory routes/gates not fully passed.
- Portable release lacks second-PC dry-run evidence bundle.
- HKL package boundary still needs source inventory consolidation.

content.body:
- Runtime decision recorded: 9000 may restart for UI fixes without further approval; 9001 must remain PID 1656 unless Lucas explicitly approves otherwise.
- Terminal decision now fixed by CEO: grid live xterm is OFF. Grid cards are static bounded tail/status only; interactive terminal belongs to focused/fullscreen/popout surfaces.
- Input-text-loss priority is above visual polish until Korean IME and long wrapped text are proven safe.
- 9100 requirement changed: redesign as a card/progress executive board rather than a raw list once terminal P0 is stabilized.
- Portable priority recommendation: memory/restart/ledger portability first, UI polish second.
- HKL handover scope: Android now required; iOS/G10 included as reference unless TF identifies mandatory delivery content.

content.title: ETA
content.body:
- Terminal hard reset remains active; latest Max trail still assigns developer-1 owner and developer-4 QA, but visible acceptance is not yet met.
- Terminal issues target remains visible resolution by 14:00 KST, but current status is on-track only if the next patch removes grid replay/flow and text loss together.
- Input text loss reproduce/fix ETA: Max must keep a 10-minute reporting cadence until 14:00 KST; latest lane is still open, not done.
- 9100 redesign is deferred behind terminal stabilization; no clean ETA should be treated as committed yet.
- Memory/portable evidence gate: same-day collection, second-PC proof remains release blocker.

- Runtime PIDs: 9000 PID 44132; 9001 PID 1656 preserved.
- data/work-ledger.json tasks: ops-progress-space-20260602, ceo-9100-board-cleanup-20260602, terminal-buffer-instant-render-20260602, terminal-input-text-loss-20260602, memory-system-hq.

content.title: Decisions Needed
content.body:
- Terminal decision is now explicit: grid live xterm is off. Grid cards must stay static bounded tail/status only; interactive terminal belongs to focused/fullscreen/popout.
- Text-loss decision is also explicit: terminal-input-text-loss-20260602 outranks visual polish until Korean IME and long text are proven safe.
- 9100 direction changed: redesign into a card/progress executive board rather than continuing as a raw-list cleanup once terminal P0 is stabilized.
- Memory/portable scope remains: prioritize restart memory + ledgers first, UI polish second.
- HKL handover: decide final manual package boundary after TF source inventory confirms Android/iOS/G10 scope.

content.title: Current Blockers
content.body:
- terminal-buffer-instant-render-20260602: user-visible fail persists. Lucas still sees replay/flow problems, so prior ready claims are invalid; patch remains blocked pending new Max/developer-1/developer-4/audit evidence.
- terminal-input-text-loss-20260602: Korean/long text can disappear mid-composition, risking loss before ledger capture; this is now terminal P0.
- memory-system-hq: commit gate depends on QA evidence, restart-risk note, and auto-memory contract.
- portable-release-20260603: second-PC dry-run and durable data migration proof still pending.
- hkl-auth-manual-handover-20260602: source inventory and final package boundary still being consolidated by HKL TF.

content.title: Memory Recovery Contract
content.body: Restart recovery must load, in order: AGENTS.md, boot context, command/state policies, agent boot prompts, work-ledger, ceo-command-ledger, memory-ledger/recovered context, branch decisions, latest agent ops events, relevant terminal log tails, and canvas decision portal. Terminal scrollback is evidence only, not primary memory.

content.title: Owners
content.body:
- Caesar: supervision, staffing, decision summary, commit gate coherence.
- Max: implementation decomposition and developer assignment.
- Ops Recorder: hourly report and blocker summary maintenance.
- Audit Officer: policy/dirty-worktree/commit boundary review.
- QA Gate: evidence gate before done/commit.
- Developer-7: Lucas direct only, excluded from automation.

content.title: Next Actions
content.body:
1. Max reports terminal P0 owner/QA/ETA every 10 minutes until 14:00 KST, with 9000 restart allowed and 9001 PID 1656 preserved.
2. Ops Recorder keeps this portal and Lucas Operations Progress current from ledger/events/session reports.
3. Audit Officer keeps the Caesar emergency diff uncommitted until the scoped terminal fix is ratified and QA passes.
4. QA Gate collects focused evidence for text-loss safety, zero grid xterm previews, no replay storm, and fullscreen/popout interactivity.
5. 9100 redesign resumes only after terminal P0 user-visible acceptance is met.

content.body:

  Lucas daily goal 2026-06-02 KST: write Heungkuk Life integrated-auth manual and prepare handover while LCC Core portability work continues. Raise four visible GPT-5.4 HKL handover TF agents on 9001. Preserve developer-7 for Lucas direct work; do not restart 9001.

- portable-release-20260603: doing, priority=140
  Lucas goal: by 2026-06-03 KST make LCC Core v0.1 portable to another PC, including HQ-style memory baseline. Release plan: docs/portable-release-plan-20260602.md. Exclude developer-7; preserve 9001 live singleton; prove fresh-clone/bootstrap/memory/ledger/terminal UX gates.

- p0-terminal-stability-20260601: doing, priority=130

Max owns ledger-based execution. developer-2 HQ benchmark/contract, developer-5 UI patch candidate, developer-3/developer-6 ledger link/no-data-loss, developer-4 QA/CDP gate. developer-7 is excluded and reserved for Lucas direct remote-debug only.

Max tracks follow-up assignments: API review, web recovered-context panel, auto-memory from work-ledger events, QA plan. developer-7 reserved for Lucas direct remote-debug. No commit until QA evidence and restart-risk note are ready.

  ACK dev-team-up state=acknowledged owner=mira-ledger. Track Development Team P0 execution visibility, Spring MSA TF schedule/readiness, and port 9002 stability supervision. 2026-05-31 17:26 KST check: 9002 HTTP returned 200; local listener PID 28104 observed.

- p0-ui-overlay-occlusion: doing, priority=119
  Owner Dev Alpha. Acceptance: local disconnect/status overlay and ledger floating badge removed/repositioned or made draggable/dockable; no occlusion of primary controls/input/footer; position persistence if feasible.

- p0-newline-audit-1410: doing, priority=118
  All staff must inspect own terminal and subordinate terminals. Required pty lines: ACK newline-audit <role>; REPORT newline-audit status=<ok|affected|fixed|blocked> evidence=<exact terminal/session/file/test>. Scope: bottom chat input, terminal internal composer, fullscreen/modal composer, Shift+Enter newline, Enter submit, IME composing Enter, image attach/delivery path, command no-response, plan wait, Enter wait.
